payload.answer: The repeated Slack delivery appears to describe the same fact from the same event, so it should be treated as a potential duplicate rather than committed twice.
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
repair_options: Ignore the retry event as a duplicate and do not add another memory.
Ask the user to confirm whether this is a duplicate delivery or a separate occurrence of the same fact.
If confirmed as intentional repetition, keep only one durable fact but optionally record that it was seen more than once.
